package.title: Senior Citizen Relaxed — Munnar, Kumarakom & Alleppey

highlights.text: Gracefully paced Relax Kerala passage designed for senior citizens and relaxed families
Step-free ground-floor rooms, captain-seat luxury van, and patient chauffeur care
Gentle Munnar tea garden panoramas without steep trekking requirements
Two serene nights at Kumarakom lakefront resort with bird sanctuary and sunset cruise
4-hour premium Alleppey houseboat day cruise with mild-spice onboard lunch
TRAGUIN 24/7 remote concierge with daily senior guest comfort check-ins

itinerary.title: Senior Citizen Relaxed — Munnar, Kumarakom & Alleppey
itinerary.tagline: Relax Kerala — Graceful Comfort for Senior Travellers
itinerary.overview: A gracefully paced ultra-comfortable journey through God's Own Country purposefully designed for senior citizens — slow tea garden walks in Munnar, therapeutic Kumarakom lakefront serenity, a premium Alleppey day cruise, and accessible Fort Kochi heritage with zero fatigue and maximum luxury.
itinerary.seo_title: KL-009 | Senior Citizen Kerala | TRAGUIN Relax Kerala Passage
itinerary.seo_description: Luxury 05 Nights / 06 Days senior-friendly Kerala package (KL-009) covering Munnar, Kumarakom, Alleppey day cruise, and Cochin with accessible premium stays.

days.title: Cochin to Munnar — Smooth Ascent to Mist-Kissed Hills
days.description: Your journey begins with a smooth arrival at Cochin International Airport where a TRAGUIN guest relations officer welcomes you with fresh flower garlands. Travel in a spacious premium vehicle with wide doors and captain-style seats toward Munnar, pausing to admire Cheeyappara Waterfalls from roadside viewpoints.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Roadside views of Cheeyappara & Valara Falls, Western Ghats Scenic Drive
Evening Experience: Relaxed evening at the resort garden terrace with light classical flute music
Overnight Stay: Munnar (Handpicked Senior-Friendly Luxury Resort)
Meals Included: Custom Gourmet Dinner (Mild Spices)

days.title: Munnar Hills — Tea Garden Panoramas
days.description: Gentle Munnar sightseeing avoiding steep paths — Mattupetty Dam lakeside promenade, accessible Tea Museum, Echo Point flat trail, and curated walk through an organic spice and tea nursery.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Mattupetty Dam viewpoint, Echo Point flat trail, Tea Museum, Lockhart Garden Gallery
Evening Experience: Private interactive session with a local tea master demonstrating artisanal brewing methods
Optional Activities: Mild Ayurvedic foot reflexology treatment at the resort wellness center
Overnight Stay: Munnar (Handpicked Senior-Friendly Luxury Resort)

days.title: Munnar to Kumarakom — Tranquil Lakeside
days.description: After a leisurely breakfast, your chauffeur guides the luxury vehicle down smooth slopes to Kumarakom on Vembanad Lake. Check into your waterfront resort and enjoy a relaxing sunset boat cruise with traditional light snacks.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Scenic downhill drive, Kumarakom Lake Vistas
Evening Experience: Relaxing sunset boat cruise directly from the resort jetty with traditional light snacks onboard
Optional Activities: Gentle authentic Ayurvedic full-body rejuvenation massage focusing on joint comfort
Overnight Stay: Kumarakom (Premium Waterfront Luxury Resort)

days.title: Kumarakom — Day of Absolute Rest
days.description: A completely relaxed day — optional gentle chair-yoga, long breakfast with fresh tropical fruits, electric golf-cart resort tour, and Kumarakom Bird Sanctuary on accessible flat paths.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Kumarakom Bird Sanctuary entry (accessible flat paths or golf-cart views)
Evening Experience: Classic Kathakali dance performance from comfortable reserved front-row seats
Optional Activities: Pottery making, traditional indoor games, or consultation with a wellness expert
Overnight Stay: Kumarakom (Premium Waterfront Luxury Resort)

days.title: Alleppey Day Cruise to Cochin — Backwater & Heritage
days.description: Drive to Alleppey for an exclusive ultra-luxury private houseboat day cruise with flat decks and wide seating. Enjoy a mild-spice lunch onboard, then continue to your heritage hotel in Fort Cochin for a relaxed final evening at Chinese Fishing Nets.
activities: Sightseeing Included: 4-Hour Exclusive Backwater Cruise, Alleppey Lagoons, Fort Cochin Heritage Drive
Evening Experience: Relaxed stroll to see historic Chinese Fishing Nets at sunset from the paved beach promenade
Overnight Stay: Cochin (Premium Heritage Luxury Hotel)
Meals Included: Breakfast, Traditional Houseboat Lunch & Farewell Dinner

days.title: Cochin Departure
days.description: Enjoy a relaxed breakfast at your heritage hotel. Stop at a luxury boutique center for handwoven shawls, tea blends, or aromatic spices before a comfortable assisted transfer to Cochin International Airport.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Flexible morning drive through Fort Cochin or localized boutique shopping
Evening Experience: TRAGUIN assisted luggage handling and seamless airport check-in coordination
Overnight Stay: Not Applicable (Departure Day)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

inclusions.text: Luxury hotel stays with step-free or easily accessible ground-floor rooms
Daily breakfasts and custom low-spice gourmet dinners at all resorts
Private 4-hour luxury Alleppey houseboat day cruise with custom mild-spice lunch
Premium extra-comfortable luxury vehicle with captain seating for all transport
Experienced personal chauffeur trained for senior guest care and flexible pacing
Complimentary sunset cruise on Vembanad Lake and traditional welcome wellness drinks
All fuel costs, road tolls, parking fees, driver allowances, and TRAGUIN 24/7 remote concierge
Airfares, airport taxes, and train tickets
Entry tickets for monuments, historical palaces, or national parks
Personal expenses, optional intensive spa therapies, and travel or medical insurance
